title: Razzia
writer: Auguste Le Breton, Henri Decoin, Maurice Griffe
actors: Jean Gabin, Marcel Dalio, Lino Ventura
plot: Henri, the Man from Nantes, comes back to his country after a successful stay in the United States, where he was working for Liski, the drug dealer. With the fame of being a tough guy preceding him, he sets himself to the task of ...
